text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk Manhattan Cafe back to the dorms, just as
the sun begins to set.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Are you free after this?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Then... would you mind waiting for me at the
park?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
There's a picnic table in the back... If we sit
there... I don't think anything will bother us...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'll get everything ready and then head over... See
you soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Manhattan Cafe runs off to the
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is there something she wants to discuss with me?
Well, either way, I should head for the park.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm waiting at the picnic table for Manhattan
Cafe, when...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn around to see her standing with a large bag
in her hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets the bag down on the table, then takes
out its contents and lines them up one by one.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Everything's ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several insulated jugs now sit on the table, along
with a stack of paper cups.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Coffee. I brewed it all myself...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
The coffee in this jug has a light, acidic taste...
And the one next to it has a deeper, aromatic
taste...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
This one has a fruity sweetness to it... That one
has a balance of acidity and bitterness...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Which would you like to drink?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Do any of them stand out to you? Does one look
more delicious than the others?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She questions me with a long, unwavering gaze. I
can't put my finger on why, but I feel immense
pressure.
choice_data_list: I'd like to try your favorite one.

Since you made them all, I'd like to try
everything.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What I like... isn't important right now, so...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'm... sorry about that... I was being a little pushy
there...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I was just... curious is all.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to know your tastes... Your favorite type
of coffee...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
But... I couldn't think of any other way to find
out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come to understand why she made so many
different blends of coffee for me. With that in
mind...
choice_data_list:
Why don't we try them together and share our
tastes?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you... very much. Let's do that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, under the night sky and surrounded by
Manhattan Cafe's thoughtfully prepared coffee,
we share our favorite flavors with each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our chat keeps my heart warm long after the
coffee has cooled.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's not a good idea... You'll get a
stomachache...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Coffee is delicious... but you can have too much
of a good thing...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I've done it before, so I try to be more careful
now... You should too.
choice_data_list: But you took the time to brew all of this...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I appreciate the thought, but also...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry... I was being a little pushy there...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I was just... curious is all.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to know your tastes... Your favorite type
of coffee...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But all I've done is... trouble you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come to understand why she made so many
different blends of coffee for me. With that in
mind...
choice_data_list:
Why don't we try them together and share our
tastes?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you... very much. Let's do that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, under the night sky and surrounded by
Manhattan Cafe's thoughtfully prepared coffee,
we share our favorite flavors with each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking my time so as not to get a stomachache, I
savor each coffee and feel warmed to the core by
this tasting session.
